name: 法玛斯 | 纪念碑
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been custom painted gold and features various details celebrating 20 years of Counter-Strike. Here's to 20 more
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，通体黄金，丰富的游戏元素点缀其间，以纪念反恐精英系列20年的成长历程。 现在要奔三了！
